## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Pamela Weber for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Management:** Pamela uses ClickUp to prevent deadline conflicts by scoping projects upfront, assigning clear deadlines to all stakeholders, and conducting proactive check-ins.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Systemic Quality Control:** A built-in QA process, including a deliberate review gap after drafting, ensures high-quality content. Pamela's attention to detail is so high that she often spots minor errors on shared screens during calls.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [**Agile & Collaborative:** Views feedback as a "great feedback loop" for improvement. Successfully pivoted a campaign's keyword strategy based on CTO feedback to better match user intent, preventing wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Ideal Fit:** The role's blend of client management, content strategy, and AI marketing directly matches Pamela's experience from her current dual-role position at CSS/Edgy Digital.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Managing Competing Deadlines

  - [**Context:** Manages deadlines for both internal SaaS projects (CSS) and external agency clients (Edgy Digital), including Toyota and Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proactive project scoping in ClickUp.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Creates a project card with a full brief and all necessary assets.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [Assigns specific deadlines to each stakeholder (e.g., writer, designer).](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [This provides full workflow visibility, preventing surprises and enabling early intervention.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Conflict Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Negotiates priorities by asking which project best serves company goals.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Seeks win-win solutions (e.g., pushing a deadline from Thursday EOD to Friday noon).](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Emphasizes collaboration over rigid adherence to individual deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### The Solution: Systemic Quality Control

  - [**Process:** A built-in QA process prevents major errors.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Includes a deliberate review gap between final draft completion and final review.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [This creates mental distance, allowing for a fresh perspective to catch overlooked issues.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [**Attention to Detail:** Pamela's high standard for quality is constant.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Frequently spots minor errors on shared screens during calls and flags them for correction, even before content is published.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### The Mindset: Agile & Collaborative

  - [**Feedback:** Views constructive criticism as a "great feedback loop" for professional growth.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Example:** A content campaign's keyword strategy, partly generated by AI, was flagged by the CTO as not matching user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Action:** Pamela pivoted the strategy to new keywords, preventing wasted effort on an ineffective approach.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### The Fit: Pamela's Background & Role Alignment

  - [**Experience:** Current role at CSS/Edgy Digital combines client management, content strategy, and AI marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**AI:** Learned efficient AI use with InkFast and helped roll out the SmithOS agent.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The position's requirements directly match Pamela's experience and interests.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Editorial Judgment:** Shaping assignments based on strategy and pivoting as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Workflow Management:** Overseeing the full content production process.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** Providing the critical human insight needed to refine AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:** Discuss interview with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [**Murilia:** Follow up with Pamela regarding a take-home assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/UtbK_QmjzEAWpCBNudwYeKW-cGersTM7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
